title: Claude theme
description: Schema for Claude Code custom theme files.
markdownDescription: Schema for Claude Code custom theme files. See the [official reference](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/terminal-config#create-a-custom-theme) for the full token list and behavior.

$schema.description: Optional reference to the JSON Schema this file conforms to.

name.description: Display label shown in /theme. Defaults to the filename slug.
name.markdownDescription: Display label shown in `/theme`. Defaults to the filename slug.

base.description: Built-in preset the theme starts from. Defaults to 'dark'.
base.markdownDescription: Built-in preset to start from. Tokens not listed in `overrides` fall through to this preset. Defaults to `dark`.

overrides.description: Map of color token names to color values. Tokens not listed fall through to the base preset. Unknown tokens are ignored at runtime.
overrides.markdownDescription: Map of color token names to color values. Tokens not listed fall through to the `base` preset. Unknown tokens and invalid values are ignored at runtime.

^(red|blue|green|yellow|purple|orange|pi.description: Color used to draw subagents whose definition specifies the matching color (red, blue, green, yellow, purple, orange, pink, or cyan).

^rainbow_(red|orange|yellow|green|blue|i.description: Rainbow palette color used by special UI effects.

claude.description: Primary brand accent — spinner and assistant label.
claude.markdownDescription: Primary brand accent. Used for the spinner and assistant label. Pairs with `claudeShimmer` for the animated gradient.

inverseText.description: Text drawn on top of a colored background, such as status badges.

inactive.description: Secondary text such as hints, timestamps, and disabled items.
inactive.markdownDescription: Secondary text such as hints, timestamps, and disabled items. Pairs with `inactiveShimmer`.

subtle.description: Faint borders and de-emphasized secondary text.

permission.description: Dialog borders, including permission prompts and pickers.
permission.markdownDescription: Dialog borders, including permission prompts and pickers. Pairs with `permissionShimmer`.

warning.description: Warnings, caution messages, and the auto mode border.
warning.markdownDescription: Warnings, caution messages, and the auto mode border. Pairs with `warningShimmer`.

promptBorder.description: Input box border in the default permission mode.
promptBorder.markdownDescription: Input box border in the default permission mode. Pairs with `promptBorderShimmer`.

bashBorder.description: Input box border when entering a ! shell command.
bashBorder.markdownDescription: Input box border when entering a `!` shell command.

diffAddedDimmed.description: Background of unchanged context near added lines.

diffRemovedDimmed.description: Background of unchanged context near removed lines.

diffAddedWord.description: Word-level highlight within an added line.

diffRemovedWord.description: Word-level highlight within a removed line.

userMessageBackground.description: Background behind your messages in the transcript (fullscreen mode).

selectionBg.description: Background of text selected with the mouse (fullscreen mode).

claudeShimmer.description: Lighter color in the spinner's animated gradient.
claudeShimmer.markdownDescription: Lighter color in the spinner's animated gradient. Pairs with `claude`.

permissionShimmer.description: Lighter color in the permission border's animated gradient.
permissionShimmer.markdownDescription: Lighter color in the permission border's animated gradient. Pairs with `permission`.

warningShimmer.description: Lighter color in the auto mode border's animated gradient.
warningShimmer.markdownDescription: Lighter color in the auto mode border's animated gradient. Pairs with `warning`.

promptBorderShimmer.description: Lighter color in the input box border's animated gradient.
promptBorderShimmer.markdownDescription: Lighter color in the input box border's animated gradient. Pairs with `promptBorder`.

fastModeShimmer.description: Lighter color in the fast mode indicator's animated gradient.
fastModeShimmer.markdownDescription: Lighter color in the fast mode indicator's animated gradient. Pairs with `fastMode`.

inactiveShimmer.description: Lighter color in an inactive item's animated gradient.
inactiveShimmer.markdownDescription: Lighter color in an inactive item's animated gradient. Pairs with `inactive`.

userMessageBackgroundHover.description: Background behind your messages on hover (fullscreen mode).

messageActionsBackground.description: Background behind message action buttons (fullscreen mode).

rate_limit_fill.description: Fill color of the rate-limit progress indicator.

rate_limit_empty.description: Empty (background) color of the rate-limit progress indicator.

briefLabelClaude.description: Brief label color for Claude messages.

briefLabelYou.description: Brief label color for user messages.

chromeYellow.description: Chrome accent color (used by the Chrome extension).

professionalBlue.description: Professional blue accent (used by the Grove style).

claudeBlue_FOR_SYSTEM_SPINNER.description: Blue color used by the system spinner.

claudeBlueShimmer_FOR_SYSTEM_SPINNER.description: Lighter color in the system spinner's animated gradient.
